# Who Is Taylor (NotGreg)

*Background gathered from February 17, 2026 call*

---

## Background

- 33 years old, self-employed
- Payment processor/banker — primary business is replacing Stripe/traditional processors with NMI/Authorized.net for entrepreneurs; earns lifetime residuals on every closed account
- Also consults entrepreneurs on revenue, retention, and business structure
- Has an in-house software development team
- Works with musicians and artists privately, advising them on revenue streams
- Found DD on Discord while looking for a server tag he liked; impressed by the branding and server structure
- Goes by NotGreg on Discord — from a lifelong habit of naming video game characters "Gregory"

## Personal

- From the Collegeville/Westchester PA area
- Spent a year in Ghana during COVID (planned short trip, got typhoid, pandemic lockdowns trapped him for the year)
- Has a private bookmaking operation with close friends (Venmo-based, small scale)
- Self-described degenerate gambler but not a professional bettor
- Sister Hannah (19) is his 50% business partner and virtual assistant

## Businesses / Ventures

- Payment processing / point-of-sale systems (primary income)
- Sportsbook app (in beta — private book with close friends, fronts lines/credit)
- Discord community for live music/concerts/art (in early stages)
- Nigerian record label contact (works with someone who collaborated with Ed Sheeran, Fuse ODG)

## Credibility Check (Pending)

Taylor offered to send over company links and vendor contacts for Dax to verify. **No independent verification done yet.** Do not advance the relationship materially until credibility is confirmed.
